_comment: Factory-level design-stage MCP default server list. Copied into new projects by /new-project step 5b (refactor-003). Registered via /register-mcp-servers --scope=design. Fixed list — not an architect decision. Servers with feature_flag are gated by the pipeline flag set (--flags=nanobanana).

mcp_servers.name: icons8
mcp_servers.purpose: Icon search and download for UI Kit gap-fill

mcp_servers.name: unsplash
mcp_servers.purpose: Stock photos for UI screens (hero, placeholders)

mcp_servers.name: image-generator
mcp_servers.purpose: Hero images, onboarding/empty-state illustrations, logos (Gemini 2.5/3.x Flash Image)
